title: ecbolium ciliatum
intro: Ecbolium ciliatum, also known as the hairy ecbolium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium ciliatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for a variety of applications in traditional medicine.
